content.text: Change the retry block in the client config from fixed backoff to exponential with jitter.

content.content:
retry:
    enabled: true
    attempts: 3
    delay_ms: 500
    strategy: fixed
    max_delay_ms: 500
    jitter: false
    give_up_after_ms: 5000

input.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: config/client.yaml
@@ retry:
     enabled: true
-    attempts: 3
-    delay_ms: 500
-    strategy: fixed
-    max_delay_ms: 500
     jitter: false
+    attempts: 6
+    base_delay_ms: 200
+    strategy: exponential
+    max_delay_ms: 8000
     give_up_after_ms: 5000
*** End Patch

content.content:
Successfully applied patch to the following files:
config/client.yaml
